title: Special Topic in Human/Environment Interactions

prerequisites.text: Acceptance for Honours or Master's specialising in EGS.

outline: Issues and themes in contemporary aspects of the Human/Environmental interface will be covered. Specific attention will be given to profiling core debates in a specialist field of human or environmental geography. The course focuses on using theory while encouraging the use of case studies. Course outcomes emphasise the development of conceptual and analytical skills.
dp_requirements: At least 80% attendance record and submission of all assignments.
